More Works

Measuring the (Un)Faithfulness of Concept-Based Explanations

In our CVPR 2026 paper, we propose SURF, a principled faithfulness measure for unsupervised concept-based explanations. We show that many prior explanation methods are not as faithful as previously reported.

CVPR 2026

Academic Project Page

Shubham Kumar*,Collaborator Name*,Prof. Narendra Ahuja
University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign
Sample Conference 2024
*Indicates Equal Contribution

Abstract

This is a sample abstract for an academic project page. Replace this with your paper’s abstract. The template supports teaser videos, image carousels, YouTube embeds, PDF posters, and BibTeX citations.

Overview

Use the markdown body for additional sections such as method details, comparisons, or acknowledgments. Figures and tables in markdown are supported here.
